name: bsplinex

metadata.name: BSplineX
metadata.summary: The B-Spline library you have always dreamed of were performance and easy-to-use interfaces live in harmony.

documentation:
# BSplineX Python bindings

You read it correctly, we also have Python bindings!

Install

```bash
pip install -e .
```

Install with examples dependencies

```bash
pip install -e ".[examples]"
```

modules.name: examples.ex_evaluate
documentation: Create and evaluate a non-uniform B-Spline.
